title: [MTR4] VDL retexture & Black cab by Soodari
description: This resourcepack adds VDL Citea retextures, black cab and truck for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
![buses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22e601c5ad23016f5d5125cf4ff1943f930b0104.png)

## Overview
This Resourcepack adds VDL Citea retextures (Original model by CinderaceOTS' ADL Enviro200 & secondary RHT-Drive Citea by Szandor13).

* MTR4 Only. Not compatible with MTR3
* No drivers are included.

## VDL Citea original retextures & other related RPs

[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vdl-citea-lle-120](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vdl-citea-lle-120)
VDL Citea LLE-120 by Szandor and Original Enviro link by CinderaceOTS

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vdl-citea-vor-regionalbus
VDL Citea - VOR Regionalbus for MTR3 (Retexture by Frosch640)

https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr4-vdl-citea-carris-metropolitana
VDL Citea - Carris Metropolitania (Retexture by Vitor2005)
